description: World's most valuable company. Designs iPhones, iPads, Macs, Apple Watch, and services. Fabless chip designer using TSMC for manufacturing. Major customer of Japanese semiconductor suppliers.

_externalRelationships.notes: Secured 50%+ of TSMC 2nm capacity for 2026. iPhone 18 and M6 chips on 2nm. Agreed to 2x price increase for Kioxia NAND (Q1 2026). 20%+ of TSMC revenue.

_metadata.dataSource: Yahoo Finance, 24/7 Wall St, Motley Fool
_metadata.notes: World's most valuable company at $3.89T. TSMC's largest client. 30% of 2nm from TSMC Arizona. Fabless model.
